message:
fix(templates): use agentMailNavigate instead of window.location.href

Replace direct window.location.href assignments with
window.agentMailNavigate() in archive_browser and overseer_compose
templates. This ensures navigation goes through the app's centralized
routing handler rather than raw browser navigation, which is needed
for proper SPA-style page transitions and state management.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
